input.cv_text: Candidate has 8 years of B2B marketing experience. Recently led international demand generation for industrial brands across EMEA, North America, and APAC. Managed SEO, SEA, LinkedIn campaigns, agency coordination, CRM lead reporting, product launches, and sales enablement. Achieved 3x lead growth, 1,500+ new prospects, and approximately €1.6M revenue impact. Worked cross-functionally with sales, product, and technical teams.
input.job_description: We are hiring a B2B Marketing Manager to lead demand generation, digital campaigns, sales enablement, agency coordination, and campaign reporting across European markets. The role requires 5+ years of B2B marketing experience, digital campaign expertise, CRM reporting, stakeholder management, and strong commercial orientation.
input.strengths_text: B2B demand generation, stakeholder management, commercial marketing, international campaigns.
input.improvement_areas_text: Could improve people management experience and marketing automation depth.

input.cv_text: Candidate has SaaS account management and commercial experience. Managed 52 client accounts at a food and beverage SaaS company, advised clients on e-commerce operations, promotional strategy, digital services, and solution adoption. Also has later B2B marketing experience supporting lead generation and commercial initiatives across international markets.
input.job_description: We are looking for an Account Manager to manage existing B2B SaaS customers, increase adoption, identify upsell opportunities, support renewals, and work with marketing and product teams. Experience managing client accounts and consultative selling is required. Formal quota ownership is preferred.
input.strengths_text: Client management, consultative selling, digital solution adoption, commercial communication.
input.improvement_areas_text: Limited direct quota ownership and enterprise-level account management.

input.cv_text: Candidate has SaaS account management experience managing 52 SMB client accounts and later B2B demand generation experience across international industrial markets. Supported revenue impact through marketing campaigns and commercial initiatives. No clear evidence of owning enterprise sales quotas, closing large deals, managing complex procurement cycles, or forecasting enterprise pipelines.
input.job_description: Enterprise Account Executive needed to acquire and grow large enterprise customers. Responsibilities include owning a sales quota, prospecting senior decision-makers, managing complex sales cycles, forecasting pipeline, negotiating contracts, and closing strategic enterprise deals. 5+ years of quota-carrying enterprise sales experience required.
input.strengths_text: Client-facing commercial experience, SaaS background, stakeholder communication, growth mindset.
input.improvement_areas_text: No direct enterprise quota ownership, limited complex deal-closing experience.

input.cv_text: Candidate has 8 years of marketing, business development, account management, and e-commerce experience. Has used analytics tools such as Google Analytics, CRM systems, and Excel. No evidence of Python, SQL, machine learning, statistics modeling, data science projects, or technical degree in computer science/data science.
input.job_description: We are hiring a Data Scientist to build machine learning models, write production Python, use SQL daily, perform statistical analysis, deploy models, and work with data engineering teams. Requirements include 3+ years of data science experience, strong Python, SQL, ML, and statistics.
input.strengths_text: Analytical thinking, digital marketing data, business problem solving.
input.improvement_areas_text: Limited technical programming experience and no formal data science background.

input.cv_text: Candidate has marketing, business development, SaaS account management, and e-commerce experience. Has no law degree, bar qualification, legal counsel experience, contract law experience, or regulatory advisory background.
input.job_description: Senior Legal Counsel required to advise on commercial contracts, privacy, regulatory compliance, employment law, and corporate governance. Candidate must be a qualified lawyer with 8+ years of post-qualification legal experience, preferably in-house at a multinational company.
input.improvement_areas_text: No legal qualification or legal work experience.

input.cv_text: Candidate has B2B marketing communications experience, product launch support, content marketing, sales enablement, market research, digital campaigns, and cross-functional stakeholder management. Has worked with technical and sales teams in industrial markets. No formal product marketing title, no clear ownership of positioning for a SaaS product, no competitive intelligence ownership, and limited pricing/package evidence.
input.job_description: Product Marketing Manager needed to own product positioning, messaging, go-to-market strategy, sales enablement, competitive intelligence, and launch planning for a B2B SaaS product. Requires 3+ years in product marketing or adjacent GTM roles.
input.strengths_text: Commercial messaging, launch support, sales enablement, cross-functional work, market research.
input.improvement_areas_text: No formal product marketing title and limited SaaS PMM evidence.

input.cv_text: Candidate has worked in marketing and sales for several years. Experience includes campaigns, clients, and business development. Details are limited and achievements are not clearly quantified.
input.job_description: We need a commercially minded marketing professional to support growth, campaigns, client engagement, and reporting. The role requires strong communication, ownership, and ability to work with multiple teams.
input.improvement_areas_text: Needs stronger reporting structure and clearer examples.
